---
title: "Divad Chaudhary Website (4)"
---

# Divad Chaudhary

## About Me

My name is Divad Chaudhary. I am a student at the University of Winnipeg, currently pursuing a Bachelors of Arts in Economics. I am a big fan of The Weeknd.

Student Number: 3159752

Email: chaudhary-d\@webmail.uwinnipeg.ca
